best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-system-008 title: verify message entity creation module: message source pages: 2 preconditions: the system is running, and a chat exists. test data: a message with id=1, chat_id=1, receiver=1, timestamp="2023-10-01 12:00:00", text="hello". test steps: 1. create a new message with the specified attributes. 2. store the message in the database. expected result: the message is successfully created and stored in the database.
